title: coreosma affinis
intro: Coreosma affinis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Coreosma affinis include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation. The herbal preparations of Coreosma affinis typically involve steeping the leaves in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
